next_steps: Install: npm install && npx playwright install chrome (scripts use system Chrome channel)
Edit slides.html — each <section class="slide"> is one slide; hand-drawn art via <div class="art" data-art="<scene>" data-w=.. data-h=..> (scenes defined in doodles.js)
Styling lives in deck.css (BRAND block already carries your brand tokens)
PDF: npm run render (render.js slides.html out/deck.pdf)
PNG per slide: npm run shots (shots.js slides.html out/shots slide)
New doodle scenes: add a case to doodles.js using the rough.js helpers (gear, robot, arrows...)
